headline: Forget High-Flying Oil Drillers: 1 Fee-Based Midstream Giant to Buy Right Now
summary: EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) is the name every oil bull is screaming about as WTI crude spiked to $114.58 in early April 2026 and traders pile into upstream drillers to play the Iran war supply shock. The EOG Trade Is a Sugar High Geopolitical premium fades. It always does. And when it does, EOG holders get ... Forget High-Flying Oil Drillers: 1 Fee-Based Midstream Giant to Buy Right Now
